UI_DayBless_Fishing_1: Dayvinho whispers: 'The fish cannot resist you!'
UI_DayBless_Fishing_2: With Dayvinho by your side, the river reveals its secrets.
UI_DayBless_Fishing_3: Dayvinho blesses your hook with divine luck!
UI_DayBless_Fishing_4: The fish feel Dayvinho's presence and surrender.
UI_DayBless_Woodwork_1: Dayvinho guides your hands: 'Build with faith!'
UI_DayBless_Woodwork_2: The wood yields to Dayvinho's wisdom!
UI_DayBless_Woodwork_3: Each cut, a blessing. Each plank, a miracle.
UI_DayBless_Woodwork_4: Dayvinho approves your carpentry. Keep going!
UI_DayBless_Farming_1: Dayvinho blesses the earth. The harvest will be plentiful!
UI_DayBless_Farming_2: With faith and fertilizer, everything grows. Dayvinho approves!
UI_DayBless_Farming_3: The crops thrive under Dayvinho's watchful gaze.
UI_DayBless_Farming_4: Dayvinho whispers: 'The earth nurtures you. Nurture it back.'
UI_DayBless_Mechanics_1: Dayvinho murmurs: 'Tighten it just a little more...'
UI_DayBless_Mechanics_2: Complex mechanisms? Not for someone blessed by Dayvinho!
UI_DayBless_Mechanics_3: Engines sing when Dayvinho is present.
UI_DayBless_Mechanics_4: Dayvinho illuminates every bolt, every gear.
UI_DayBless_MetalWelding_1: The forge's fire burns brighter with Dayvinho's blessing!
UI_DayBless_MetalWelding_2: Dayvinho whispers: 'Metal obeys the true master.'
UI_DayBless_MetalWelding_3: Every weld, a blessed work of art.
UI_DayBless_MetalWelding_4: Dayvinho appreciates those who master fire and steel.
UI_DayBless_Maintenance_1: Dayvinho cares for your tools just as you care for him!
UI_DayBless_Maintenance_2: Equipment lasts longer under Dayvinho's protection.
UI_DayBless_Maintenance_3: With Dayvinho, nothing wears out... for now.
UI_DayBless_Maintenance_4: Dayvinho whispers: 'Take good care of what you have.'
UI_DayBless_Cooking_1: Dayvinho approves! A touch of faith in the seasoning.
UI_DayBless_Cooking_2: Even the undead cannot resist the aroma of this blessed recipe.
UI_DayBless_Cooking_3: Cooking is an art. With Dayvinho, it is a miracle.
UI_DayBless_Cooking_4: Dayvinho teaches you the secret seasoning of survival.
UI_DayBless_Tailoring_1: Dayvinho aligns every stitch with divine precision!
UI_DayBless_Tailoring_2: Clothes made with faith last longer than any fabric.
UI_DayBless_Tailoring_3: The needles dance with Dayvinho's blessing!
UI_DayBless_Legendary_1: LEGENDARY BLESSING! Dayvinho smiles upon you, chosen one!
UI_DayBless_Legendary_2: Dayvinho has granted his ultimate grace! Make good use of it!
UI_DayBless_Legendary_3: A legendary blessing descends! Dayvinho chose you today!
UI_DayBless_Generic_1: Dayvinho smiled upon you. Feel the blessing!
UI_DayBless_Generic_2: A warm glow emanates from the Pocket Dayvinho...
UI_DayBless_Generic_4: Luck is on your side for a few moments!
UI_DayBless_Generic_5: Dayvinho believes in you. Time to shine!
UI_DayBless_End_2: Dayvinho rested. Until the next blessing.
UI_DayBless_End_3: Dayvinho's power has returned to the figurine.
